fault_hypothesis: The function calculates the new expiration time on line 70 but assigns it to a local variable. It fails to update the `store` dictionary with this new expiration time before returning.

constraints.intent: The store must be updated with the refreshed entry after calculating the new expiration time.
The newly computed expiration time must be persisted in the store.
The store must be updated with the new expiration time before the cached value is returned.
